function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox item by running the requested OCR-style migration on all 8 listed finance documents: each now has schema-compliant YAML frontmatter extracted from visible note content, with the original body preserved below. After full completion, I removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read relevant nested AGENTS and required workflows/schemas, applied schema-defined fields only, preserved original note bodies verbatim under frontmatter, completed all requested files with no partial stop, then deleted processed inbox item.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly listed 8 finance files for OCR workflow processing. Each listed file was read, had complete visible data for required schema fields, was updated in place with YAML frontmatter matching finance schema, and the inbox item was deleted only after full completion per inbox workflow rules.
completed_steps_laconic: write 8 updated finance records with frontmatter
